creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
Please consider this patch instead (slightly more
recent development version, new geoip option,
pkg-plist fixed).  With regard to the mirrors, there
are many more that can be added from the list at:

https://www.torproject.org/mirrors.html.en

Recently, the onionland mirror seems to be updated
very slowly, or not at all.  A more up-to-date German
mirror is:

http://mirror.bsdhost.eu/www.torproject.org/dist/

(for example -- there are others).

Regards, 
          b.
